_comment: Golden-canvas fixture manifest (Keystone E0.3). Each entry declares the expected validator outcome. The validate()/strip() assertions in test_fixtures.py xfail until E1 implements them; the JSON-shape + declared-level checks run now.

fixtures.note: Minimal JSON Canvas 1.0 — required fields + explicit toEnd:arrow only.
Core + styleAttributes (shape/border/textAlign/path/pathfinding within enums) + isStartNode + a group.

Extended + populated _reserved (adna_version/conformance_level/sync/component_types/semantic_bindings/panel_link/context_object) + _lattice_meta. Also the degradation case: strip() must drop _reserved and validate at extended (D-1).
Negative: directed edge omits toEnd:arrow (C-4 / I4). Validator must reject at Core.
